title: Create a Virtual Private Cloud, Route table, Internet Gateway, Nat Gateway
My Production Ready Containerized 3 Tier on AWS
content: Architecture Overview 1. Create a Virtual Private Cloud, Route table, Internet Gateway, Nat Gateway 2. Create a Security groups for ALB, ECS Cluster, BastionHost, and Database 3. Create a Subnet Group, and RDS Postgres Engine 4. Launch a BastionHost server 5. Create an Application Load Balancer and Target group 6. Create an ECR, Task Definition, and ECS Cluster 7. Implement to authenticate GitHub Actions on AWS using OIDC Identity Provider 8. Build and push docker image to ECR and deploy to ECS use Github Actions 9. Connect to BastionHost migration DB 10. Create a S3 Static Website and CloudFront for frontend 11. GitHub Action CI/CD Pipeline for frontend 12. Setup target tracking policy and monitoring backend service
